generated_oml:
instance PrimaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary position encoder mounted directly on the motor of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PrimaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder positioned behind the gearbox of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance PrimaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PrimaryEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance PrimaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series position data from primary encoder transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PrimaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series position data from secondary encoder transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for multi-level abstraction modeling including requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and technical layer"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling and simulation of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MathWorksSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical simulations and friction model identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance ACMEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL for real-time system modeling and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc ADL for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance RFLPMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for addressing system complexity in MBSE"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance OOSEMMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for object-oriented system engineering"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SPESMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for system engineering processes"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SMArDTMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for system architecture modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance CodeImplementationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ and Java code implementation for detailed robot control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization via interactive dashboard for operational monitoring of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeAnalyticsInsight, DashboardInteractionAction
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Advanced friction model identification using white-box and black-box approaches for predictive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDerivationInsight, PhysicalRelationshipsInsight
]

instance FrictionLossDerivationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derivation of friction losses from sensor data to improve robot control accuracy"
]

instance PhysicalRelationshipsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Understanding of physical relationships within the robot system for optimization"
]

instance RealTimeAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time analytics for operational monitoring and system state assessment"
]

instance DashboardInteractionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User interaction through dashboard for monitoring and intervention"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 system under study for digital twin"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC system controlling robot axes for real-time processing"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Integrated gear transmission in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance IndustrialManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Industrial manufacturing environment where MABI MAX 100 robot operates"
    base:contains MABIMAX100Robot, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController, GearTransmission
]

instance SysMLGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric structural model of MABI MAX 100 robot using SysML Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model of MABI MAX 100 robot using SysML state machines (v1.7)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using MontiArc Automaton for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomatonEnabler
]

instance MathWorksSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical simulation model for friction identification using MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through comparison of simulated data versus measured data to quantify deviations, with sensor arrangements reducing backlash and positional uncertainty. Continuous improvement of both white-box and black-box friction models enhances accuracy and minimizes prediction errors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for transmitting time-series sensor data. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency, reliability mechanisms, redundancy strategies, and security protocols are not specified in the provided documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for digital twin interoperability and the SysML modeling language for systems engineering, ensuring adherence to industry specifications for data exchange and model integration."
]
